name: Naturepedia™ Change Log
description: Machine-readable incremental update feed for Naturepedia™, Robbie's Razor™, Plate™ systems, AI discovery infrastructure, and canonical registries.

entries.summary: Activated the complete Water Systems Registry, System Map, and Knowledge Mesh retrieval family and connected Weather constraints to surface and subsurface hydrological behavior.
changes: Added the Water Systems Registry at 5.00 USDC
Retained and upgraded the Water System Map at 5.00 USDC
Added the Water Systems Knowledge Mesh at 25.00 USDC
Added two new v1 compatibility aliases
Connected Weather precipitation, storms, temperature, snowpack, and evaporation to Water Systems behavior
Mapped Wetland Ecosystems, River Systems, Floodplains, Groundwater Systems, and Estuaries & Coastal Systems into the Water Systems discovery family
Updated naturepedia-index.json
Updated llms.txt and llms-full.txt
Updated x402 live endpoint documentation
Updated production route counts to 87 v1, 83 x402, and 178 total machine-facing routes
Preserved the canonical registry count at 737 because no new Plate IDs were created

entries.summary: Added nine live field-location Wildlife System pages across the canonical registry, secondary Plate registry, cold-bird fallback registry, and llms-full discovery layer.
changes: Added nine unique Wildlife System Plate IDs
Expanded the canonical registry from 728 to 737 unique Plate IDs
Expanded the canonical system count from 100 to 109
Expanded registry references from 732 to 741
Added all nine records to the secondary Plate registry
Added all nine records to the cold-bird fallback registry
Added all nine records to llms-full.txt

entries.summary: Restored three standalone Naturepedia Plate IDs and reconciled the canonical registry to 728 unique Plate IDs.
changes: Restored the Mycelial Networks standalone Plate ID
Restored the Carbon Cycle standalone Plate ID
Restored the Soil Microbiome standalone Plate ID
Normalized the Mycelial Networks ID in the secondary registry
Added the three standalone Plates to the Plate examples index
Reconciled 732 registry references to 728 unique Plate IDs
Confirmed four repeated Pollinator Plate IDs are intentional cross-references
Updated canonical registry count and modification metadata

entries.summary: Removed a duplicated Plant Electrophysiology registry family, restored the omitted 10-Plate Hydrothermal Ecosystems family across canonical discovery layers, and corrected dynamic Bazaar resource advertising.
changes: Removed the duplicated Plant Electrophysiology family from the canonical registry
Added 10 Hydrothermal Ecosystems Plate records to the canonical registry
Added the Hydrothermal Ecosystems family to the secondary Plate registry
Aligned the Hydrothermal section in the Plate examples index
Added all 10 Hydrothermal Ecosystems Plate records to llms-full.txt
Corrected Bazaar metadata so each x402 challenge advertises its own requested resource URL
Verified machine-client 402 responses for the Plate Registry and Location System Map

entries.summary: Corrected three obsolete Naturepedia page URLs and restored the omitted Acadia and Aransas Field Location Plate entries.
changes: Corrected the Wildlife Sign & Tracking canonical page URL
Corrected the Food Webs & Ecological Relationships canonical page URL
Corrected the Wildlife Species public page URL
Added the Acadia National Park Field Location Plate to the canonical registry
Added the Aransas National Wildlife Refuge Field Location Plate to the canonical registry
Added Acadia and Aransas to the machine-readable Plate registry
Added Acadia and Aransas to the Plate examples index
Added Acadia and Aransas to llms-full.txt
Added Acadia and Aransas to the x402 Location System Map
Corrected copied Bosque del Apache metadata on the live Aransas page
Added backward-compatible redirects for the three obsolete page URLs

entries.summary: Added Weather™ as a Naturepedia Earth Systems atmospheric hub.
changes: Published the Weather™ system page
Added 10 new canonical Weather Plate™ entries
Increased the canonical Plate count from 708 to 718
Added Weather™ to the Canonical Plate Registry
Added Weather™ to the Naturepedia Index
Added the Weather registry endpoint
Added the Weather relationship-map endpoint
Added the Weather Knowledge Mesh endpoint
Added Weather v1 compatibility routes
Expanded Naturepedia v2 discovery output
Updated cold-bird Cloudflare Worker
Updated llms.txt Cloudflare Worker
Updated llms-full.txt Cloudflare Worker
Expanded x402 Weather retrieval infrastructure
Updated registry-state count metadata

entries.summary: Added Fractals™ and Fibonacci™ to the Geometry Mesh.
changes: Published Fractals™ system
Published Fibonacci™ system
Added 20 new canonical Plate™ entries
Updated Geometry Index
Updated Naturepedia Index
Updated Canonical Plate Registry
Updated llms.txt
Updated llms-full.txt
Expanded x402 registry endpoints
Expanded Knowledge Mesh architecture
